basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) has published the Research Associate and Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website https://www.manit.ac.in/. The recruitment drive aims to fill 5 Research Associate and Field Investigator positions on a contractual basis. Candidates holding a postgraduate degree in Public Administration, Economics, Rural Development, Sociology, Population Studies, Management, Commerce, Statistics, or related Social Science disciplines with a minimum of 55% marks are eligible to apply online at the official websit

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in Public Administration/Economics/Rural Development/Sociology/Population studies/Management/Commerce/Statistics and related social science disciplines with minimum 55% marks
qualification.details: Research Associate: Post-graduation in Public Administration/Economics/Rural Development/Sociology/Population studies/Management/Commerce/Statistics and related social science disciplines with minimum 55% marks in post-graduation. Desirable: well versed in Computer knowledge/excel/SPSS and data handling. Field Investigator: Post-graduation in Public Administration/Economics/Rural Development/Sociology/Population studies/Management/Commerce/Statistics and related social science disciplines with minimum 55% marks in post-graduation. Desirable: well versed in Computer knowledge/excel/SPSS and data handling.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.37000/- per month (Research Associate), Rs.20000/- per month (Field Investigator)
salary_details.details: Research Associate: Rs.37000/- per month Field Investigator: Rs.20000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MANIT Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MANIT Bhopal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MANIT Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate: Post-graduation in Public Administration/Economics/Rural Development/Sociology/Population studies/Management/Commerce/Statistics and related social science disciplines with minimum 55% marks in post-graduation. Desirable: well versed in Computer knowledge/excel/SPSS and data handling. Field Investigator: Post-graduation in Public Administration/Economics/Rural Development/Sociology/Population studies/Management/Commerce/Statistics and related social science disciplines with minimum 55% marks in post-graduation. Desirable: well versed in Computer knowledge/excel/SPSS and data handling.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Research Associate: Rs.37000/- per month Field Investigator: Rs.20000/- per month

rows.event: Last Date for submission of online application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MANIT Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MANIT Bhopal to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Research Associate and Field Investigator posts is 07-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate and Field Investigator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies, with 1 for Research Associate and 4 for Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post-graduation in specified social science disciplines with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for a Research Associate?
faq.answer: The salary for a Research Associate is Rs.37000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for a Field Investigator?
faq.answer: The salary for a Field Investigator is Rs.20000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate and Field Investigator posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of MANIT Bhopal.

faq.question: Q9. Where is MANIT Bhopal located?
faq.answer: MANIT Bhopal is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification.
